sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46240" key="*zhnodoth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ζηνοδοτήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n46240.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">giver of Zeus</tr_>, i.e. of his counsel, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
